label: TetA
note: TetA is the pBR322 class C tetracycline efflux pump, a 396-aa, 12-helix MFS antiporter that confers tetracycline resistance by exporting a tetracycline-divalent-cation complex in exchange for a pro...

label: TM1
note: First of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 7-27, 1-based).

label: TM2
note: Second of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 46-66, 1-based).

label: TM3
note: Third of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 80-100, 1-based); harbors functional Asp86.

label: TM4
note: Fourth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 104-124, 1-based).

label: TM5
note: Fifth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 139-159, 1-based); begins at native Cys139.

label: TM6
note: Sixth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 161-181, 1-based); end of the N-terminal 6-TM bundle, contains native Cys178.

label: TM7
note: Seventh of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 211-231, 1-based); start of the C-terminal 6-TM bundle, after the large central cytoplasmic ...

label: TM8
note: Eighth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 247-267, 1-based).

label: TM9
note: Ninth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 278-298, 1-based); harbors functional Asp287.

label: TM10
note: Tenth of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 300-320, 1-based).

label: TM11
note: Eleventh of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 340-360, 1-based).

label: TM12
note: Last of 12 MFS transmembrane helices (UniProt P02981 TRANSMEM 365-385, 1-based); contains native Cys381; the C-terminus is cytoplasmic.

label: Tet-efflux/MFS Motif A
note: Diagnostic Motif-A loop (G-x-x-x-D-R-x-G-R-R) of MFS/tetracycline-efflux transporters, in the cytoplasmic loop between TM2 and TM3; subsequence GALSDRFGRR (r...

label: Asp17
note: Conserved Asp at the cytoplasmic edge of TM1; one of three critical aspartates (Asp17/Asp86/Asp287).

label: Asp86
note: Conserved Asp within TM3; Asp->Ala reduces or eliminates tetracycline resistance and is required for wild-type function (Allard & Bertrand 1992).

label: Asp287
note: Conserved Asp within TM9; Asp->Ala reduces or eliminates tetracycline resistance and is required for wild-type function (Allard & Bertrand 1992).

label: Cys59
note: Native Cys in TM2; one of four cysteines characterized as important but not essential for tetracycline transport (Cys-less mutant retains substantial activit...

label: Cys139
note: Native Cys at the cytoplasmic edge/start of TM5; important but not essential for tetracycline transport (Jewell et al.

label: Cys178
note: Native Cys in TM6; important but not essential for tetracycline transport (Jewell et al.

label: Cys381
note: Native Cys in TM12; important but not essential for tetracycline transport (Jewell et al.

functional_claims.label: Confers tetracycline resistance by active efflux (class C MFS antiporter).
